name: Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells laminated films in Japan. The company engages in photogravure printing and bag making; photogravure cylinder making; and sale of paper packaging, packing paper, label stickers, plastic molding products and packing materials, packaging and industrial machinery, agricultural related materials, and horticultural equipment. It also imports and exports packaging materials; designs, constructs, and sells synthetic resin floor materials; installs machinery and appliances; plans, produces, and sells advertising; and provides package design and advertising agency services. Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
